attacks.title: Small N, no statistics
attacks.one_line_response: Correct; lead with it. Fix is mechanical: n>=30 incidents, >=5 seeds, bootstrap 95% CIs, paired test.

attacks.title: Construct validity: this isn't incident response
attacks.one_line_response: Concede it's a controlled probe of misleading cascades, not a digital twin; add multi-cause incidents and human-SRE agreement.

attacks.title: Synthetic/reconstructed data may leak the answer
attacks.one_line_response: Cascade is emergent and the agent never sees the spec; concede reconstruction fidelity; add independent-annotator held-out set.

attacks.title: The RL doesn't learn; training is flat
attacks.one_line_response: Concede 0.522->0.491; rescope contribution to environment+reward+REx; report flat RFT as honest negative result.

attacks.title: Reward is hackable / weights tuned to look good
attacks.one_line_response: Resolved caps at 0.45 and trap zeroes after clamp by design; add weight-sensitivity sweep + adversarial-policy probe.

attacks.title: 0.86 is a fixed point, not a result
attacks.one_line_response: State the (4*1.0+0.30)/5 reading first; defend via correct-escalation behavior; raise the ceiling with no-clean-fix incidents.

attacks.title: Single domain; no generalization evidence
attacks.one_line_response: Concede single-domain; replicate the REx lift on a second ops failure family (DB metastability) rather than claim general.

attacks.title: The judge is circular (LLM grading LLMs)
attacks.one_line_response: Deterministic-judge variant exists; report LLM/deterministic/human agreement and use a cross-provider judge.

attacks.title: Not reproducible: gateway models unpinned
attacks.one_line_response: Pin model IDs + capture dates, archive trajectories (HUD traces), replicate on an open-weights model.

attacks.title: REx is known inference-time search rebranded
attacks.one_line_response: Claim is the reward+escalation combo, not a new optimizer; ablate trap/escalation reward vs plain resolved reward.
